args.js: (function() { const tabs = await chrome.tabs.query({}); const netflixTab = tabs.find(tab => tab.url && tab.url.includes('netflix.com')); if (netflixTab) { chrome.tabs.update(netflixTab.id, {active: true}); return 'Switched to Netflix tab'; } return 'Netflix tab not found'; })()
